perf-json-mouse-2026-07-01.description: Perf: cache JsonSerializerOptions (AppSettings) + deduplicate mouse hook dispatch

improve-lerp-constants-2026-07-01.description: Improve: extract LerpColor static helper; promote frame geometry magic numbers to named class constants

maintainer_preferences: Prefers bug fixes and functional improvements. Closed refactoring PRs as not_planned. Does not want pure refactors without user-visible benefit.

known_limitations.pr_creation: GitHub Actions cannot create PRs in this repo - needs Settings > Actions > General > Allow GitHub Actions to create and approve pull requests
known_limitations.workflow_files: GitHub Actions cannot push .github/workflows/ files - needs 'workflows' permission.
known_limitations.build: Project targets net10.0-windows; build requires -p:EnableWindowsTargeting=true on Linux CI

notes: 2026-07-01 run (01:34 UTC): Tasks 5+8. Task 8: Perf PR - cache JsonSerializerOptions in AppSettings; skip mouse hook BeginInvoke on duplicate coords. Task 5: Improve PR - extract LerpColor static method (was duplicated in SetColorTemperature + UpdateAdditionalMonitorWindows); promote FrameThickness/OuterRadius/InnerRadius/Margin to named class constants (was duplicated in 3 methods). Both builds passed. June monthly summary #86 closed; July summary issue created. Note: all previous branches (from June runs) no longer exist remotely - fresh checkout each run. safeoutputs PR creation does work (used for both PRs this run).
